'''Maggot's Cantina''' was a drinking and dining establishment on [[Anzat/Legends|Anzat]].

The [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] was a gathering place for [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] and [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] who came to the [[Anzat Spaceport]] to refuel or for business issues. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] visited the cantina on a mission; the [[Houk/Legends|Houk]] [[Gort (Houk)|Gort]] was present [[20 BBY/Legends|at the time]].

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 72|''Republic'' 72]] {{1st}}
